================= REPORT SAVE =================

[CCSDS HEADER]
MsgId      : 0x0825
Seq        : 0xC000
Len        : 0x0215
TimeCode   : 00 D4 5C 04 DD DC
Padding    : 0x00000000

[REPORT BODY]
Reflected MID  : 0x1880
Reflected CC   : 0x00
RetType        : 0x00
RetCode        : 0
RetValSize     : 14

================= PARSED BY MID/CC =================
ReflectedMID : 0x1880
ReflectedCC  : 0x00
PayloadLen   : 14
payload_valid=1

[UELYSYS TTC]
CommandCounter=28505
ErrorCounter=26995

[PAYLOAD HEX]
59 6F 73 69 20 49 6E 20 53 70 61 63 65 00 

[RETURN VALUE]
59 6F 73 69 20 49 6E 20 53 70 61 63 65 00 

[BINARY DATA]
